pr_title: fix: B1 step-gate, medical example, review length cap
pr_description: Cherry-picked from PRs #354 (NO) and #355 (CONDITIONAL), with a new review length cap to prevent the haiku verbosity overflow. B1 fix**: Scope `partial_recovery` events to `identify_potential_levers` only. Remove stale `expected_calls=3` from `_run_levers`. Medical example**: Replace urban-planning (Section 106) with medical (IRB/clinical-site sequential overhead). Domains: agriculture, medical, insurance — no overlap with test plans. No game-dev example (caused domain collision in iter 36). No explicit prohibition (backfired for llama3.1 in iter 36). Review length cap**: Add "20–40 words" guidance to section 6 to prevent haiku verbosity overflow (iter 37: gta_game hard failure from ~550 char reviews × 21 levers × 3 calls = 40KB EOF). OPTIMIZE_INSTRUCTIONS**: Document structural homogeneity, prohibition backfire, and verbosity amplification.
